series_metadata.series_title: Federal Insecticide, Fungicide, and Rodenticide Act (FIFRA) Laboratory Records
series_metadata.series_description: Federal Insecticide, Fungicide, and Rodenticide Act (FIFRA) laboratory records include laboratory analytical reports, sample collection reports, e-mails communicating sample testing, laboratory Quality Assurance/Quality Control data (spikes, blanks, recovery etc), all other data generated by the laboratory. The FIFRA supervisor is the Record Retention coordinator.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 5 years ; Electronic: 5 years, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
